You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Oracle to Autonomous Database migration.

Quais etapas para migrar Redis on-premises da BioResearch Labs (projeto api-gateway-deployment, compartment shared-services)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 48OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#55]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

Quais etapas para documentar regras de seguranca da SecureBank Corp (projeto ci-cd-pipeline, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.Optimized3.Flex, 48OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#111]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Security (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id production \
  --display-name "high-cpu-production" \
  --metric-compartment-id production \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/overview.htm

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Compute (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Quais sao os requisitos para configurar error tracking APM no ambiente da SmartCity IoT (backup-strategy)? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 1OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#33]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Apm (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id staging \
  --display-name "high-cpu-staging" \
  --metric-compartment-id staging \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

**Security Audit — Connectivity (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Performance Tuning — Compute (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Metricas criticas:**
| Metrica | Threshold | Acao |
|---------|-----------|------|
| CPU Utilization | >80% sustained | Scale up ou adicionar instancias |
| Memory | >85% | Verificar memory leaks, scale up |
| Network throughput | >70% da capacity | Considerar shape com mais bandwidth |
| Disk IOPS | >80% provisionadas | Aumentar performance tier do Block Volume |

**Otimizacoes de shape:**
- VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex: 4 OCPUs — ideal para workloads balanced
- Flexible shapes: ajuste OCPUs e memory independentemente
- Dense I/O: para workloads com alto IOPS local
- GPU: para ML inference e rendering

**Tuning de sistema operacional:**
- Kernel parameters: net.core.somaxconn, fs.file-max
- TCP: enable TCP BBR congestion control
- Storage: use paravirtualized attachment para latencia menor
- Oracle Cloud Agent: habilitar todos os plugins

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.e0103c7010dd506e638047f40c0dc6ab \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.resource.us.e0103c7010dd506e638047f40c0dc6ab
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

Diagnostico e resolucao de problemas para vault-keys - AutoDrive Systems - container-platform:

**Problema comum 1: Recurso nao inicia**
```bash
# Verificar estado do recurso
oci kms key get --key-id ocid1.vault.us.69578764b25e3f12cbe51005b8c9ac6d \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', error:'fault-domain'}"

# Verificar eventos recentes
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.vault.eu.3070f56a0448d277d5e6253d82610d28 \
  --query "data[?contains('request.resource.id', 'ocid1.vault.eu.3070f56a0448d277d5e6253d82610d28')]"
```

**Problema comum 2: Erro de permissao**
1. Verifique as IAM policies no compartment `networking`
2. Confirme que o usuario/grupo tem acesso ao servico
3. Verifique dynamic groups se usando instance principal

**Problema comum 3: Timeout de conexao**
1. Verifique Security Lists e NSGs
2. Confirme route tables e gateways
3. Teste conectividade com `nc` ou `telnet`

**Checklist de validacao:**
- [ ] Recurso esta no estado correto?
- [ ] Permissoes IAM configuradas?
- [ ] Networking configurado corretamente?
- [ ] Logs mostram erros?
- [ ] Metricas dentro do esperado?

**Metricas de sucesso:**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop indices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave

- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload

```bash
oci db autonomous-database update \
```

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar dynamic group para instâncias auto-scaling?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow any-user to read vault-secrets-family in bucket reports-bucket
```

```
Allow group SecurityAdmins to read object-family in compartment Security
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

Como configurar Dynamic Groups para Container Instances com foco em configurar para FinServe Digital no projeto disaster-recovery-setup? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 64OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#24]

**Integration Pattern — Dynamic Groups (FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com dynamic-groups:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to manage objects in compartment sandbox
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to use secret-family in compartment sandbox
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

**Disaster Recovery — Vault Secrets (FoodChain Trace - database-consolidation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

1. Establish baseline com metricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimizacao isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**
- OCI Monitoring: metricas em tempo real
- OCI APM: application performance monitoring
- OCI Logging: logs estruturados para analise
- Service Connector Hub: pipeline de observabilidade

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.eu.079ebb9daa71cd4e48dccfc023e61342 \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.resource.eu.079ebb9daa71cd4e48dccfc023e61342
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

```
                ↓

                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to manage objects in compartment devops
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Dynamic Groups. Provide technical guidance on dynamic group rules and instance principal.

Como usar instance principal para MediaStream Pro (multi-region-expansion) no compartment analytics (ap-sydney-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#29]

**Security Audit — Dynamic Groups (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido

- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexoes
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponivel

Passo a passo para diagnosticar restore operation problems da DataFlow Solutions (projeto data-lake-modernization, us-ashburn-1, development) [context: shape=VM.Optimized3.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#102]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (DataFlow Solutions - data-lake-modernization)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Database/Concepts/databaseoverview.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Cloud Guard. Provide technical guidance on detector recipes and responder rules.

Quais sao os requisitos para configurar alertas Cloud Guard no ambiente da EduPlatform Global (performance-tuning)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#47]

**Security Audit — Cloud Guard (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/CloudGuard/concepts/cloudguardoverview.htm

Como configurar drift detection para MediaStream Pro (multi-region-expansion) no compartment analytics (ap-sydney-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#29]

**Integration Pattern — DevOps (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```
Git Repo → OCI DevOps Build → OCIR → OKE / Compute
                ↓
        OCI DevOps Deploy
                ↓
        OCI Functions / Compute Instance Group
                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'analytics'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'analytics'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group analytics-functions to manage objects in compartment analytics
Allow dynamic-group analytics-functions to use secret-family in compartment analytics
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Como planejar e executar configurar encryption keys rotation para LogiTrack Logistics no projeto security-hardening (ca-toronto-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 8OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#28]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para encryption - LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci kms key create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='data-platform'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "encryption-data-platform-027" \
  --region ca-toronto-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci kms key list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.vault.eu.6029e15069116966c9c4e7ff951d4623 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ENABLED'].{name:"display-name",mode:"protection-mode"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci <service> update \
  --key-id ocid1.vault.us.ee742515b2605acb87e44c1efa24e883 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "data-platform", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci kms key get \
  --key-id ocid1.vault.us.ee742515b2605acb87e44c1efa24e883 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci <service> delete \
  --key-id ocid1.vault.us.ee742515b2605acb87e44c1efa24e883 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `data-platform`
- Region: `ca-toronto-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `8`
- Storage: `500 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Autonomous Database. Provide technical guidance on ATP, ADW, wallet management, and connection strings.

Quais etapas para resolver performance problems de ADB da BioResearch Labs (projeto api-gateway-deployment, compartment shared-services)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 48OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#55]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

**Security Audit — Vcn (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Dynamic Groups. Provide technical guidance on dynamic group rules and instance principal.

Melhores praticas para configurar Dynamic Groups para monitoring no contexto GameForge Studios/zero-trust-implementation (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1) [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#54]

**Integration Pattern — Dynamic Groups (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com dynamic-groups:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to manage objects in compartment sandbox
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to use secret-family in compartment sandbox
```

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI Functions. Provide technical guidance on function deployment, invocation, and monitoring.

Quais etapas para diagnosticar function invocation timeout da RetailMax Online (projeto compliance-audit, compartment shared-services)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#125]

**Integration Pattern — Serverless (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Arquitetura:**
```
Internet → API Gateway → OCI Functions → OCI Services
                                    ↓
                    ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
                    ↓               ↓               ↓
              Object Storage   Autonomous DB   OCI Vault
```

**Fluxo de dados:**
1. Client faz request via API Gateway
2. API Gateway autentica e roteia para Function
3. Function processa, acessa servicos OCI via SDK
4. Response retornada ao client

**Exemplo de integracao:**
```python
import oci
from fdk import response

def handler(ctx, data: dict = None):
    object_storage = oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(
        oci.config.from_file()
    )
    namespace = object_storage.get_namespace().data
    object_storage.put_object(
        namespace_name=namespace,
        bucket_name="results",
        object_name="output.json",
        put_object_body=oci.util.to_stream(data)
    )
    return response.Response(
        ctx, response_data={"status": "success"},
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'shared-services'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'shared-services'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group shared-services-functions to manage objects in compartment shared-services
Allow dynamic-group shared-services-functions to use secret-family in compartment shared-services
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data transfer. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale transfers.

A SecureBank Corp precisa acelerar transferencias Object Storage para o projeto ci-cd-pipeline. Como fazer no compartment production? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 48OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#31]

**Migration Guide — Cloud provider → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Cloud provider → OCI):**
| Cloud provider | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Cloud provider

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in network security. Provide technical guidance on Security Lists, Network Security Groups, and ingress/egress rules.

Melhores praticas para otimizar regras de seguranca no contexto AgriTech Innovations/hybrid-cloud-integration (devops, me-jeddah-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 32OCPUs, 100GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#110]

**Security Audit — Security (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**

- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como dar permissão para um serviço acessar recursos?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow dynamic-group AutoScaleInstances to inspect container-family in tenancy
```

```
Allow dynamic-group DatabaseInstances to manage object-family-family in tenancy
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in API Gateway. Provide technical guidance on routes, integrations, authentication, and throttling.

Como implementar API Gateway de outro cloud com migrar para a AutoDrive Systems no projeto container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 8OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#76]

**Integration Pattern — Serverless (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Arquitetura:**
```
Internet → API Gateway → OCI Functions → OCI Services
                                    ↓
                    ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
                    ↓               ↓               ↓
              Object Storage   Autonomous DB   OCI Vault
```

**Fluxo de dados:**
1. Client faz request via API Gateway
2. API Gateway autentica e roteia para Function
3. Function processa, acessa servicos OCI via SDK
4. Response retornada ao client

**Exemplo de integracao:**
```python
import oci
from fdk import response

def handler(ctx, data: dict = None):
    object_storage = oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(
        oci.config.from_file()
    )
    namespace = object_storage.get_namespace().data
    object_storage.put_object(
        namespace_name=namespace,
        bucket_name="results",
        object_name="output.json",
        put_object_body=oci.util.to_stream(data)
    )
    return response.Response(
        ctx, response_data={"status": "success"},
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to manage objects in compartment networking
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to use secret-family in compartment networking
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on file storage and data transfer.

A SecureBank Corp esta no projeto ci-cd-pipeline e precisa migrar DFS para File Storage. Como proceder no production (sa-saopaulo-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 4OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#11]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

**Security Audit — Iam Basics (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on EC2 to Compute migration and shape mapping.

Passo a passo para migrar Elastic IPs para public IPs da HealthTech Systems (projeto cost-optimization, ap-mumbai-1, networking) [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 32OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#46]

**Migration Guide — AWS → OCI (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (AWS → OCI):**
| AWS | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs AWS

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

Passo a passo para configurar observability da AgriTech Innovations (projeto hybrid-cloud-integration, me-jeddah-1, devops) [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 2OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.1.0.0/16, ticket#130]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Observability (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs

Como implementar security score com monitorar para a AgriTech Innovations no projeto hybrid-cloud-integration (devops, me-jeddah-1)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 2OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.1.0.0/16, ticket#90]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Cloud Guard (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Qual a diferença entre 'manage' e 'use' em policies?

**Resolução de problemas de IAM Policies:**

Quando encontrar erros de autorização, verifique:

1. **Verifique a sintaxe da policy:**
```
Allow any-user to read functions-family-family in bucket app-bucket
```

2. **Locação da Policy:**
- Policies de tenancy afetam toda a organização
- Policies de compartment afetam apenas recursos filhos

3. **Princípios mínimos:**
```
Allow group Developers to use database-family in compartment AppDev
Allow group DBAs to manage database-family in tenancy
```

4. **Debugging:**
```bash
# Listar policies
oci iam policy list --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..

# Verificar access
oci iam authz check \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx \
  --permission USE \
  --resource-type DATABASE
```

4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on lift-and-shift and cutover planning.

Como planejar e executar mapear VMs VMware para OCI shapes para HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#126]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Qual a melhor abordagem para diagnosticar pod scheduling failures no contexto da AgriTech Innovations projeto hybrid-cloud-integration? [context: shape=VM.Optimized3.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#30]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Oke (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar política para Functions acessar Object Storage?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow group PlatformTeam to use load-balancer-family in compartment Staging
```

```
Allow any-user to read file-family-family in bucket data-bucket
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

**Performance Tuning — Storage (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**Otimizacoes:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.bucket.eu.718867c656cc15fcb8cbf792557e753a \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.bucket.eu.718867c656cc15fcb8cbf792557e753a
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.

Melhores praticas para configurar Monitoring compliance no contexto AgriTech Innovations/hybrid-cloud-integration (devops, me-jeddah-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 32OCPUs, 100GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#110]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Monitoring (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/overview.htm

Implementacao via OCI CLI para onprem-vmware - SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "onprem-vmware-production-050" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.instance.us.54f70180ac895220d2efbae468df1fae \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='RUNNING'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.a077967f6b8000372421a82b0b37ef2f \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute instance get \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.a077967f6b8000372421a82b0b37ef2f \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.a077967f6b8000372421a82b0b37ef2f \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard3.Flex`

2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao

4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos


- [ ] Networking configurado corretamente?

- [ ] Metricas dentro do esperado?

You are an OCI Terraform specialist. Provide technical guidance on Terraform remote state, state locking, and workspaces.
Quais sao os requisitos para monitorar state no ambiente da MediaStream Pro (multi-region-expansion)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#89]

**Security Audit — State (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Disaster Recovery — Storage (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Stack Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on resource monitoring and database monitoring.

Como configurar container monitoring OCI para SmartCity IoT (backup-strategy) no compartment staging (us-phoenix-1)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#113]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Stack Monitoring (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id staging \
  --display-name "high-cpu-staging" \
  --metric-compartment-id staging \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/StackMonitoring/overview.htm

  - `environment: shared-services`
  - `managed-by: terraform`

**3. Seguranca**

- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on file storage and data transfer.

Qual a melhor abordagem para migrar iSCSI LUNs para Block Volumes no contexto da AutoDrive Systems projeto container-platform? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E3.Flex, 64OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#16]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Storage/Concepts/storageoverview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.

A equipe da TechCorp Brasil quer integrar Logging com Monitoring para ecommerce-migration. Qual configuracao no compartment production? [context: shape=VM.Optimized3.Flex, 16OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#21]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Logging (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id production \
  --display-name "high-cpu-production" \
  --metric-compartment-id production \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/overview.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como resolver erro 'Not authorized' em IAM?

**Resolução de problemas de IAM Policies:**

Quando encontrar erros de autorização, verifique:

1. **Verifique a sintaxe da policy:**
```
Allow any-user to read object-family-family in bucket app-bucket
```

2. **Locação da Policy:**
- Policies de tenancy afetam toda a organização
- Policies de compartment afetam apenas recursos filhos

3. **Princípios mínimos:**
```
Allow group Developers to use database-family in compartment AppDev
Allow group DBAs to manage database-family in tenancy
```

4. **Debugging:**
```bash
# Listar policies
oci iam policy list --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..

# Verificar access
oci iam authz check \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx \
  --permission USE \
  --resource-type DATABASE
```

**Documentação:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

Implementacao via OCI CLI para waf - LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci waas waas-policy create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='analytics'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "waf-analytics-058" \
  --region ap-sydney-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci waas waas-policy list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.9db4a1e964d5790bad52e3d2b5d2f065 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"display-name",state:"lifecycle-state"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci waas waas-policy update \
  --waas-policy-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "analytics", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci waas waas-policy get \
  --waas-policy-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci waas waas-policy delete \
  --waas-policy-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `analytics`
- Region: `ap-sydney-1`
- Shape: `VM.GPU.A10.1`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `1000 GB`

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar política para Functions acessar Object Storage?

**Resolução de problemas de IAM Policies:**

Quando encontrar erros de autorização, verifique:

1. **Verifique a sintaxe da policy:**
```
Allow any-user to read database-family in bucket backup-bucket
```

```
Allow dynamic-group BatchJobs to read instance-family in tenancy
```

```
Allow service apiGateway to inspect functions-family-family in compartment DevOps
```

2. **Locação da Policy:**
- Policies de tenancy afetam toda a organização
- Policies de compartment afetam apenas recursos filhos

3. **Princípios mínimos:**
```
Allow group Developers to use database-family in compartment AppDev
Allow group DBAs to manage database-family in tenancy
```

4. **Debugging:**
```bash
# Listar policies
oci iam policy list --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..

# Verificar access
oci iam authz check \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..xxxxx \
  --permission USE \
  --resource-type DATABASE
```

**Documentação:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

Quais etapas para gerenciar container da CloudNative Inc (projeto microservices-refactor, compartment staging)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 4OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#83]

Best practices para container - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

**1. Planejamento e Design**
- Defina claramente os requisitos de container
- Escolha a regiao `us-phoenix-1` baseada em latencia e compliance
- Use o compartment `staging` para isolamento logico
- Documente arquitetura e dependencias

**2. Implementacao**
- Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform recomendado)
- Implemente tagging consistente:
  - `project: CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor`
  - `environment: staging`
  - `managed-by: terraform`
- Configure monitoring desde o inicio
- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

**Configuracao de referencia:**
- Shape: `VM.Standard.A1.Flex`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `1000 GB`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`

**Avisos importantes:**
- [MUTABLE] Precos variam por regiao e configuracao
- Sempre valide em ambiente de teste antes de producao
- Mantenha backups atualizados
- Documente todas as alteracoes
