You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on S3 to Object Storage migration.

Como migrar S3 para Object Storage para TechCorp Brasil (ecommerce-migration) no compartment production (sa-saopaulo-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 1OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#1]

**Migration Guide — AWS → OCI (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (AWS → OCI):**
| AWS | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs AWS

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in encryption. Provide technical guidance on volume encryption, BYOK, and HSM integration.
Passo a passo para auditar encryption da InsureTech Plus (projeto identity-federation, me-jeddah-1, devops) [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 8OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#60]

**Security Audit — Encryption (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**IAM Policy recomendada:**
```
Allow group developers-devops to manage vaults in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage keys in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage secrets in compartment devops
Allow service blockstorage to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Compute custom images. Provide technical guidance on custom image creation, boot volumes, and instance templates.

A EnergyGrid Monitor esta no projeto serverless-transformation e precisa documentar custom images. Como proceder no security (ap-tokyo-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#137]

**Disaster Recovery — Compute (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Estrategia de DR:**
| RPO | RTO | Estrategia | Custo |
|-----|-----|------------|-------|
| 24h | Horas | Backup + Restore | Baixo |
| 1h | Minutos | Cross-region replication | Medio |
| 0 | Segundos | Active-Active multi-region | Alto |

**Plano de recuperacao:**
1. **Backup**: Custom images + boot volume backups em regiao secundaria
2. **Replicacao**: Cross-region copy de custom images
3. **Failover**: Instance pool em regiao secundaria com auto-scaling
4. **DNS**: Steering policy para redirecionar trafego

**Comandos de recuperacao:**
```bash
# Criar backup do boot volume
oci compute boot-volume backup create \
  --boot-volume-id ocid1.resource.us.f0396f316cc98f4b0895918094cf72ed \
  --display-name "dr-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d)" \
  --compartment-id security

# Cross-region copy
oci compute boot-volume-backup copy \
  --boot-volume-backup-id ocid1.resource.us.f0396f316cc98f4b0895918094cf72ed \
  --destination-region <secondary-region>
```

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/managingcustomimages.htm

Quais etapas para migrar database functions da SecureBank Corp (projeto ci-cd-pipeline, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.Optimized3.Flex, 48OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#111]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para onprem-database - SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "onprem-database-production-110" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.database.us.5eff8e908ee37af1b8f4d34c421953d5 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='AVAILABLE'].{name:"display-name",db:"db-name"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database update \
  --autonomous-database-id ocid1.database.sa.33bd692e213f999fd78e880e19efdc72 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database get \
  --autonomous-database-id ocid1.database.sa.33bd692e213f999fd78e880e19efdc72 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci db autonomous-database delete \
  --autonomous-database-id ocid1.database.sa.33bd692e213f999fd78e880e19efdc72 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: `VM.Optimized3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `48`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure VMs to OCI Compute migration.

Melhores praticas para migrar Azure burstable VMs no contexto AutoDrive Systems/container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 64OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#96]

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in OKE. Provide diagnostic guidance on cluster, node pool, and worker node issues.

Como planejar e executar diagnosticar cluster security problems para DataFlow Solutions no projeto data-lake-modernization (us-ashburn-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 2OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.1.0.0/16, ticket#42]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Oke (DataFlow Solutions - data-lake-modernization)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id development \
  --display-name "high-cpu-development" \
  --metric-compartment-id development \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Best practices para monitoring - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

**1. Planejamento e Design**
- Defina claramente os requisitos de monitoring
- Escolha a regiao `us-phoenix-1` baseada em latencia e compliance
- Use o compartment `staging` para isolamento logico
- Documente arquitetura e dependencias

**2. Implementacao**
- Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform recomendado)
- Implemente tagging consistente:
  - `project: CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor`
  - `environment: staging`
  - `managed-by: terraform`
- Configure monitoring desde o inicio
- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

**Configuracao de referencia:**
- Shape: `VM.Standard3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `200 GB`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`

**Avisos importantes:**
- [MUTABLE] Precos variam por regiao e configuracao
- Sempre valide em ambiente de teste antes de producao
- Mantenha backups atualizados
- Documente todas as alteracoes

**Integration Pattern — DevOps (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```
Git Repo → OCI DevOps Build → OCIR → OKE / Compute
                ↓
        OCI DevOps Deploy
                ↓
        OCI Functions / Compute Instance Group
                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to manage objects in compartment devops
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in Compute. Provide diagnostic guidance on provisioning, boot volume, and SSH issues.

Como diagnosticar instance unreachable para CloudNative Inc (microservices-refactor) no compartment staging (us-phoenix-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E3.Flex, 4OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#43]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para compute - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='staging'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "compute-staging-042" \
  --region us-phoenix-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.instance.us.4c0fcfc9ee0529088fb3239e9074ec5a \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='RUNNING'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.c9c92b1e2bf93dbcb681af56e047b98d \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute instance get \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.c9c92b1e2bf93dbcb681af56e047b98d \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.c9c92b1e2bf93dbcb681af56e047b98d \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `staging`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard.E3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `50 GB`

Implementacao via OCI CLI para onprem-vmware - SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "onprem-vmware-production-110" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.instance.us.bc75eefcadefa5d99567f0524725c670 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='RUNNING'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.b3c77a7362ea885ba4ecfe4b9ef23e33 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute instance get \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.b3c77a7362ea885ba4ecfe4b9ef23e33 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.b3c77a7362ea885ba4ecfe4b9ef23e33 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: `VM.Optimized3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `48`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in MySQL HeatWave. Provide technical guidance on MySQL configuration, scaling, and replication.

Como implementar replication de MySQL com configurar para a DataFlow Solutions no projeto data-lake-modernization (development, us-ashburn-1)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 32OCPUs, 100GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#62]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (DataFlow Solutions - data-lake-modernization)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/MySQL/Concepts/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure Blob to Object Storage migration.

Como planejar e executar migrar Azure Storage network rules para AutoDrive Systems no projeto container-platform (ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 64OCPUs, 100GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#56]

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

  - `environment: networking`

- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

**Monitoring & Alerting — Scaling (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id devops \
  --display-name "high-cpu-devops" \
  --metric-compartment-id devops \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como criar policy para API Gateway acessar backends?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow group Auditors to use vault-secrets-family in compartment Analytics
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

**Disaster Recovery — Database (FoodChain Trace - database-consolidation)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to Object Storage migration.

A SecureBank Corp precisa migrar GCP Storage versioning para o projeto ci-cd-pipeline. Como fazer no compartment production? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 48OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#31]

**Migration Guide — GCP → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (GCP → OCI):**
| GCP | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs GCP

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Autonomous Database. Provide technical guidance on ATP, ADW, wallet management, and connection strings.

Quais etapas para configurar disaster recovery de ADB da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#41]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Database/Concepts/databaseoverview.htm

**Security Audit — Encryption (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**IAM Policy recomendada:**
```
Allow group developers-devops to manage vaults in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage keys in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage secrets in compartment devops
Allow service blockstorage to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

A equipe da LegalDoc Manager quer otimizar custos de auto-scaling para network-segmentation. Qual configuracao no compartment analytics? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#119]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Scaling (LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id analytics \
  --display-name "high-cpu-analytics" \
  --metric-compartment-id analytics \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure SQL to Autonomous Database migration.

A equipe da SecureBank Corp quer otimizar custos pos-migracao Azure DB para ci-cd-pipeline. Qual configuracao no compartment production? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 4OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#91]

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.
Quais sao os requisitos para configurar log search no ambiente da LegalDoc Manager (network-segmentation)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 4OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#19]

Best practices para logging - LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation:

**1. Planejamento e Design**
- Defina claramente os requisitos de logging
- Escolha a regiao `ap-sydney-1` baseada em latencia e compliance
- Use o compartment `analytics` para isolamento logico
- Documente arquitetura e dependencias

**2. Implementacao**
- Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform recomendado)
- Implemente tagging consistente:
  - `project: LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation`
  - `environment: analytics`
  - `managed-by: terraform`
- Configure monitoring desde o inicio
- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

**Configuracao de referencia:**
- Shape: `VM.Standard.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `50 GB`
- Region: `ap-sydney-1`

**Avisos importantes:**
- [MUTABLE] Precos variam por regiao e configuracao
- Sempre valide em ambiente de teste antes de producao
- Mantenha backups atualizados
- Documente todas as alteracoes

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/overview.htm

A TechCorp Brasil esta no projeto ecommerce-migration e precisa migrar vRA para Resource Manager. Como proceder no production (sa-saopaulo-1)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 1OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#81]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para onprem-vmware - TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "onprem-vmware-production-080" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.instance.us.60a4af9062de91b25da1710298fa2b86 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='RUNNING'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.daf569ec664d376d0da8a61102c82e6a \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute instance get \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.daf569ec664d376d0da8a61102c82e6a \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.daf569ec664d376d0da8a61102c82e6a \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `production`
- Region: `sa-saopaulo-1`
- Shape: `VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `1`
- Storage: `200 GB`

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar instance principal para funções?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow group SecurityAdmins to inspect load-balancer in compartment SharedServices
```

```
Allow service fnFunction to use instance-family in compartment Security
```

```
Allow group DBAs to read database in compartment Development
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

**Integration Pattern — DevOps (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```
Git Repo → OCI DevOps Build → OCIR → OKE / Compute
                ↓
        OCI DevOps Deploy
                ↓
        OCI Functions / Compute Instance Group
                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to manage objects in compartment devops
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure VMs to OCI Compute migration.

Descreva o processo de validar migracao Compute Azure-OCI para CloudNative Inc (microservices-refactor) em staging/us-phoenix-1 [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#23]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para azure-compute - CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='staging'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "azure-compute-staging-022" \
  --region us-phoenix-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci compute instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.instance.us.fce57d7520b8745d23e94ded20225426 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='RUNNING'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci compute instance update \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.537b74245abb06b2d3bc821e55bb642b \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci compute instance get \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.537b74245abb06b2d3bc821e55bb642b \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci compute instance terminate \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.sa.537b74245abb06b2d3bc821e55bb642b \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `staging`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`
- Shape: `VM.GPU.A10.1`
- OCPUs: `48`
- Storage: `1000 GB`

**Performance Tuning — Gcp Database (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com metricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)
3. Aplicar otimizacao isolada
4. Re-medir e comparar
5. Documentar resultados

**Ferramentas OCI:**

A equipe da BioResearch Labs quer otimizar performance de MySQL para api-gateway-deployment. Qual configuracao no compartment shared-services? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 4OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#35]

**Performance Tuning — Database (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop indices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave
- Query rewrite: otimiza queries automaticamente

**PostgreSQL:**
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexoes
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponivel

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.cluster.us.4a08b47490390a4fbe8f3639b782ce54 \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.cluster.us.4a08b47490390a4fbe8f3639b782ce54
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI DevOps specialist. Provide technical guidance on Vault secrets, pipeline secret injection, and rotation.
Como gerenciar secrets para SecureBank Corp (ci-cd-pipeline) no compartment production (sa-saopaulo-1)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#71]

**Security Audit — Secrets (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure Blob to Object Storage migration.

Melhores praticas para migrar Azure immutable blobs no contexto AutoDrive Systems/container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 64OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#96]

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como dar permissão para um serviço acessar recursos?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow dynamic-group FunctionsInstances to use virtual-network-family in tenancy
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como dar acesso cross-compartment para DBAs?

Para criar IAM policies corretas no OCI, use a sintaxe OCI nativa:

**Sintaxe básica de Policy:**
```
Allow <principal> to <verb> <resource-type> in <location>
```

**Exemplos de Policies:**
```
Allow dynamic-group BatchJobs to read virtual-network-family in tenancy
```

```
Allow service fnFunction to read load-balancer-family in compartment DataPlatform
```

```
Allow group DBAs to inspect load-balancer-family in compartment Production
```

**Onde usar cada tipo:**
- `group`: Para usuários humanos (developers, DBAs, admins)
- `dynamic-group`: Para instâncias e recursos OCI
- `service`: Para serviços OCI (Functions, DataFlow, etc.)
- `any-user`: Para acesso público anônimo

**Verbos comuns:**
- `manage`: Permissão total sobre o recurso
- `use`: Uso do recurso sem gerenciar
- `read`: Apenas leitura

**Referências:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on S3 to Object Storage migration.
Quais etapas para migrar S3 Select da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#41]

**Migration Guide — AWS → OCI (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (AWS → OCI):**
| AWS | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs AWS

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

**Security Audit — Authentication (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

```bash
  --region ca-toronto-1 \
```

```bash
oci network vcn update \
  --vcn-id ocid1.vcn.us.9bb504a6b48421cb928299ae141d9cbb \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening"}}' \
```

**Padrao comum:**

```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to manage objects in compartment development
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to use secret-family in compartment development
```

**Integration Pattern — Federation (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com federation:**

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to manage objects in compartment development
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to use secret-family in compartment development
```

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI Functions. Provide technical guidance on function deployment, invocation, and monitoring.

Como implementar function monitoring gaps com diagnosticar para a GameForge Studios no projeto zero-trust-implementation (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E3.Flex, 2OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.1.0.0/16, ticket#34]

**Integration Pattern — Serverless (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**Arquitetura:**
```
Internet → API Gateway → OCI Functions → OCI Services
                                    ↓
                    ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
                    ↓               ↓               ↓
              Object Storage   Autonomous DB   OCI Vault
```

**Fluxo de dados:**
1. Client faz request via API Gateway
2. API Gateway autentica e roteia para Function
3. Function processa, acessa servicos OCI via SDK
4. Response retornada ao client

**Exemplo de integracao:**
```python
import oci
from fdk import response

def handler(ctx, data: dict = None):
    object_storage = oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(
        oci.config.from_file()
    )
    namespace = object_storage.get_namespace().data
    object_storage.put_object(
        namespace_name=namespace,
        bucket_name="results",
        object_name="output.json",
        put_object_body=oci.util.to_stream(data)
    )
    return response.Response(
        ctx, response_data={"status": "success"},
        headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    )
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to manage objects in compartment sandbox
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to use secret-family in compartment sandbox
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Functions/Concepts/functionsoverview.htm

You are an OCI DevOps specialist. Provide technical guidance on Vault secrets, pipeline secret injection, and rotation.

Quais sao os requisitos para resolver problemas de secrets no ambiente da EduPlatform Global (performance-tuning)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#47]

**Security Audit — Secrets (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Disaster Recovery — Aws Database (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

A SmartCity IoT esta no projeto backup-strategy e precisa configurar monitoring GCP-OCI DB. Como proceder no staging (us-phoenix-1)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#53]

**Disaster Recovery — Gcp Database (SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

```bash
oci vault secret create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='staging'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "vault-secrets-staging-122" \
  --region us-phoenix-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci vault secret list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.vault.us.f2b69345a821f66d4c2488315530e7a4 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"secret-name",state:"lifecycle-state"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci <service> update \
  --secret-id ocid1.vault.sa.02fbabe164ae9b06d77d194db847d686 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci vault secret get \
  --secret-id ocid1.vault.sa.02fbabe164ae9b06d77d194db847d686 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**

```bash
oci vault secret schedule-secret-deletion \
  --secret-id ocid1.vault.sa.02fbabe164ae9b06d77d194db847d686 \

```

**Integration Pattern — Object (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com object:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'security'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to manage objects in compartment security
Allow dynamic-group security-functions to use secret-family in compartment security
```

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Block Storage. Provide technical guidance on block volume creation, attachment, performance tiers, and backup strategies.
Quais etapas para otimizar IOPS da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#41]

**Performance Tuning — Storage (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**Otimizacoes:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.bucket.us.24486e3d0211dc4156eb6ff2dfdc2363 \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.bucket.us.24486e3d0211dc4156eb6ff2dfdc2363
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure VMs to OCI Compute migration.

Orientacoes para migrar Azure Dedicated Hosts no cenario da HealthTech Systems - projeto cost-optimization, ap-mumbai-1, networking [context: shape=VM.Standard.E3.Flex, 2OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.1.0.0/16, ticket#106]

**Migration Guide — Azure → OCI (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Azure → OCI):**
| Azure | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Azure

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar dynamic group para instâncias auto-scaling?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow group DBAs to read load-balancer in compartment DataPlatform
```

```
Allow group PlatformTeam to manage virtual-network-family in compartment SharedServices
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Dynamic Groups. Provide technical guidance on dynamic group rules and instance principal.

A equipe da EnergyGrid Monitor quer configurar Dynamic Groups para DevOps para serverless-transformation. Qual configuracao no compartment security? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#77]

**Security Audit — Dynamic Groups (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Integration Pattern — Serverless (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com serverless:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'devops'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to manage objects in compartment devops
Allow dynamic-group devops-functions to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Documentacao: https://registry.terraform.io/providers/oracle/oci/latest/docs
You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Cloud Guard. Provide technical guidance on detector recipes and responder rules.

Como configurar Cloud Guard compliance para SecureBank Corp (ci-cd-pipeline) no compartment production (sa-saopaulo-1)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 48OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#71]

**Security Audit — Cloud Guard (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

A TechCorp Brasil precisa migrar RDS read replicas para o projeto ecommerce-migration. Como fazer no compartment production? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#101]

**Disaster Recovery — Aws Database (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

**Security Audit — Cloud Guard (CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Database (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos
